title: Mister Mayfair
overview: Max leaves New York City and his past as a gangster and now runs one of the the most glamorous clubs in London. Guns have been replaced with glamour and bank heists with the blues until the unexpected arrival of his estranged granddaughter, Barbara. Accompanied by is girlfriend, Ava, and the rest of his London crime family, Max will learn that Mayfair is just as dangerous as Manhattan, only this time he has everything to lose.
